name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed chip
M25453 Beige M47209 Black
M46492 Pink M25452 White
This Summer Bundle handbag is from the Dégradé collection, featuring a fresh drawstring design that adds a summer vibe. The Monogram Empreinte embossed leather body presents gradient tones, brightening any seasonal look. Dual handles and a detachable crossbody strap offer various carrying styles, making it a perfect companion for day and night.
28.0 x 20.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Embossed soft calfskin
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Detachable zip pocket
	•	Strap: Detachable, Adjustable
	•	Strap drop cm
	•	Strap drop max: 58.0 cm
	•	Handle: Dual handles
